title: Amflow’s TL e-bike is ready for baby’s first mountain adventure
summary: Amflow, the e-bike brand spun out of DJI, launched its TL series designed as a versatile "eSUV" for both bikepacking adventures and family commuting. The all-terrain model features a powerful 1100W mid-drive motor with up to 1280Wh of expandable battery capacity. This represents the trend toward high-performance electric bikes that combine serious capability with practical family utility.
content:
A family “eSUV” designed to be fun and practical. | Image: Amflow	

Amflow, the e-bike brand spun out of DJI, just announced its TL series, a do-it-all "eSUV" suitable for both bikepacking adventures and dropping the kid at daycare on your cycle to work.
The all-terrain TL series is built around Amflow's incredibly compact yet powerful Avinox M2 mid-drive motor. The Amflow TL Carbon offers 125Nm of hill-flattening torque and up to 1100W of peak output. It supports up to 1280Wh of battery capacity when its 800Wh removable battery is paired with a 480Wh extender. You can even opt for a hub that charges up to four batteries sequentially.
This sport-tourer comes standard with mudguards, integrated lights, and  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Amflow TL电动自行车已准备好带宝宝进行第一次山地冒险
zh.summary: Amflow是大疆旗下的电动自行车品牌，推出了TL系列，设计为多功能"电动SUV"，适用于自行车背包旅行和家庭通勤。全地形车型配备强劲的1100W中驱电动机和高达1280Wh的可扩展电池容量。这代表了高性能电动自行车的发展趋势，将严肃的性能与实用的家庭效用相结合。

title: With Starfall, SpaceX eyes an edge in global cargo delivery from orbit
summary: SpaceX is developing Starfall, a system designed to transport and deliver goods through space. This initiative marks SpaceX's expansion into orbital logistics beyond traditional launch services. The service could reshape global supply chains by enabling fast delivery from orbit.
content: The purpose of Starfall is to support the "transport and delivery of goods through space."

zh.title: SpaceX通过Starfall寻求在全球轨道货物配送中获得优势
zh.summary: SpaceX正在开发Starfall，这是一个设计用于通过太空运输和交付货物的系统。这项举措标志着SpaceX在传统发射服务之外扩展到轨道物流领域。这项服务通过实现从轨道进行快速配送，可能会重塑全球供应链。

title: The running list: major tech layoffs in 2026 where employers cited AI
summary: TechCrunch is compiling a comprehensive list of major tech company layoffs in 2026 where employers explicitly cited AI as a factor. The tracking reflects ongoing industry consolidation as companies restructure around AI capabilities. This index documents the workforce reduction impact as AI adoption accelerates across the tech sector.
content: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

zh.title: 2026年科技行业大规模裁员名单：雇主引用AI作为原因
zh.summary: TechCrunch正在编制2026年科技公司大规模裁员的综合名单，其中雇主明确将AI作为一个因素。这个跟踪反映了正在进行的行业整合，因为公司围绕AI能力进行重组。这个指数记录了随着AI在科技部门加快采用而带来的劳动力减少影响。

title: OpenAI launches new initiative to help find and patch open-source bugs
summary: OpenAI is launching an initiative to help the open-source software community find and patch security vulnerabilities. This effort addresses systemic security issues affecting the broader developer ecosystem.
content: OpenAI is attempting to tackle the security issues of the open source software community.

zh.title: OpenAI 启动新举措帮助发现和修复开源软件漏洞
zh.summary: OpenAI 正在启动一项倡议，帮助开源软件社区发现和修补安全漏洞。这项工作旨在解决影响更广泛开发者生态系统的系统性安全问题。
